image:image.image:title: Civil Engineering Suite — Professional Structural Engineering Software by Eng. Aymn Asi
image:image.image:caption: Civil Engineering Suite: professional-grade structural and civil engineering tools. Footing Pro v.2026 — ACI 318-compliant, offline, single-file.

image:image.image:title: Footing Pro v.2026 — Combined Footing Design Software
image:image.image:caption: Professional combined footing design software with 17 engineering modules, ACI 318-compliant, 100% offline. By Eng. Aymn Asi.

image:image.image:title: Footing Pro v.2026 — About: A Revolution in Foundation Design
image:image.image:caption: Footing Pro overview infographic — boundary constraints, load combinations, footing dimensions, reinforcement design, and ACI 318 code checks.

image:image.image:title: Footing Pro v.2026 — System Requirements
image:image.image:caption: Footing Pro system requirements: Microsoft Excel, Windows OS, .NET Framework, free disk space, internet connection, permissions.

image:image.image:title: Footing Pro — Dual-Mode Engine: Interactive Mode and Run Mode
image:image.image:caption: Footing Pro dual calculation engine — Interactive Mode for live input feedback and Run Mode for full ACI 318 code check execution.
